system.description:
What it does (SRD): The creature can run over opponents at least two size categories smaller. Targets can attempt attacks of opportunity or Reflex saves to avoid (per stat block). Damage is typically based on the creature’s slam or listed trample damage.

ThirdEra: Use the printed DC and damage from the stat block during movement. This seed leaves Mechanical effects and Capability grants empty so you can copy the exact numbers from the SRD entry.
